name: Central Hyrdaulic System
description: Towering copper vats rise toward the ceiling, connected by polished pipes and curious glass vessels stained
with the memory of countless brews. Ancient presses, mills, and fermentation casks remain remarkably intact,
while small maintenance machines continue to wipe away dust from equipment no one has used in generations.
The dwarves did not simply make beer, they perfected it.TODO: AI Text
